name: adding a rules-source URL to any registry surfaces its domain in the regenerated egress allowlist with no manual list maintenance
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r54-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/standards && cat > $OUT/standards/sources.yaml <<'YAML'
sources:
- id: fresh-src
  name: Fresh
  url: "https://docs.brand-new-standards-body.example/guide/"
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
YAML
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/registry-domains.sh" --root $OUT > $OUT/domains.out 2>$OUT/domains.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && grep -qx 'docs.brand-new-standards-body.example' $OUT/domains.out && grep -qx 'docs.brand-new-standards-body.example' $OUT/standards/EGRESS-ALLOWLIST.txt && grep -q 'registries=1 domains=1' $OUT/domains.err && echo added-url-domain-surfaces-automatically 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
